HomePage.title: EduCreator AI | Artificial Intelligence for Teachers
HomePage.description: Create pedagogical activities in seconds with our AI. Optimize your time and improve teaching quality.

landing.demoSubtitle: Let our AI handle the heavy lifting. In less than 2 minutes, you have an activity ready to apply.
landing.solutionSubtitle: We developed specific tools for every stage of your day. From standards to grading, EduCreator is your complete pedagogical assistant.
landing.benefit1Desc: Stop taking work home. Generate complete materials that would take hours in just a few seconds.
landing.benefit2Desc: Our AI generates original questions and texts, avoiding plagiarism and ensuring exclusive materials for your class.
landing.benefit3Desc: Dynamic and personalized activities that capture students' attention and make learning more effective.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Simple, fast and intuitive. The way teachers need it.
landing.step1Desc: Choose the topic, grade level and standards objectives you want to work on.
landing.step2Desc: In seconds, our AI creates the complete material: texts, questions and images.
landing.step3Desc: Download the formatted and professional PDF, ready to apply in class.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your school routine.
landing.ctaTitle: Save hours of planning starting today.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join the thousands of teachers already using AI to create amazing activities in seconds.
landing.footerCopyright: © 2026 EduCreator AI. Made with love by educators.
